summary: Tested all new features for Waterdrop Survivor batch: Maps system, scroll hint, new achievements, removed combo HUD, stats panel updates. All 10 test items passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: scroll hint visible, MAPS tab works, 4 stages shown (Lake unlocked, others locked with requirements), Shallows START button triggers payment modal, new achievements (Bone Collector, Titan Crusher, Eye Closer, Void Walker, Cartographer) all present, Stats panel shows new fields (Necromancer Slain, Void Titan Slain, Eye of Horus Slain, Endless Mode Reached), no combo HUD, no JS errors.
